{{Infobox concept
| name = Elder barrier
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Elder barrier]] is growing around the [[Emperor’s quarters]] and has transformed parts of the building into meat, bone, and skin.}}

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
